name: Struts: Plug-in Framework not in Use
description: The Struts application does not use the Struts Validator plug-in framework at all, meaning no automated input validation is applied and all form data passes through unchecked to application logic.
detection_pattern: META[struts_config] lacks the Validator plug-in declaration, so no CONTROL[struts_validator] node exists in the data flow and all INGRESS[form_data] flows directly to TRANSFORM or STORAGE without framework-level input validation
